mapper.select: SELECT version_no, app_cd, store_cd, version, app_code, release_dt, force_update_yn, use_yn, note, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM app_version WHERE version_no = #{versionNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_version (app_cd, store_cd, version, app_code, release_dt, force_update_yn, use_yn, note, created_by) VALUES (#{appCd}, #{storeCd}, #{version}, #{appCode}, #{releaseDt}, #{forceUpdateYn}, #{useYn}, #{note}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_version SET app_cd = #{appCd}, store_cd = #{storeCd}, version = #{version}, app_code = #{appCode}, release_dt = #{releaseDt}, force_update_yn = #{forceUpdateYn}, use_yn = #{useYn}, note = #{note}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE version_no = #{versionNo}
